subcodes.title: Words to the friends, spoken on 1914-09-02
subcodes.first_line: God does not change. He is the unchangeable, the immutable. True religion also does not change.
subcodes.subjects: @progressive revelation; renewal of religion, @changing and unchanging parts of religion, @the truth of past religions and sacred scriptures, @oneness; unity of religion, @interconnectedness of the teachings, @religion as reality; definitions of religion, @absolute freedom; independence of God
